title: Survivor Pulled From Tehran Rubble After US-Israeli Airstrikes
description: Dramatic rescue unfolds as man found alive under debris following strikes on residential area in Iran capital.
lede: In a dramatic turn amid escalating tensions, rescuers have pulled a man alive from collapsed rubble in Tehran following US-Israeli airstrikes on a residential district. The rescue operation, captured on video, highlights the human cost of the latest military action against Iranian targets.

sections.heading: Rescue Operation Unfolds
paragraphs: Emergency crews worked through debris and concrete slabs to reach the survivor, who had been trapped beneath the collapsed structure for hours. Video footage shows the moment rescuers made contact with the man, their voices calling out as they carefully extracted him from the wreckage.

The rescue team used specialized equipment and hand tools to create a path through the unstable rubble. Medical personnel stood ready as the operation progressed, with the survivor appearing conscious and responsive when finally freed.
Local residents gathered at the scene, some assisting rescue efforts while others searched for missing family members and neighbors in the aftermath of the strikes.

sections.heading: Strikes Target Residential Areas
paragraphs: The US-Israeli military operation targeted what officials described as strategic locations in Tehran, though the strikes also impacted civilian residential buildings. The specific neighborhood affected housed numerous families in multi-story apartment complexes.

Iranian authorities condemned the strikes as violations of international law, citing the targeting of civilian infrastructure. Emergency services deployed across multiple sites as damage assessments continued throughout the day.
The strikes mark a significant escalation in regional tensions, with civilian casualties raising international concerns about proportionality in military responses.

sections.heading: International Response
paragraphs: The United Nations called for immediate de-escalation and protection of civilian populations, with Secretary-General expressing grave concern over reports of civilian casualties. International humanitarian organizations prepared to provide emergency assistance.

Regional allies condemned the military action, while Western nations defended the right to self-defense against Iranian-backed threats. The strikes have drawn sharp criticism from human rights groups monitoring civilian harm.
Diplomatic efforts intensified as multiple countries called for restraint and dialogue to prevent further escalation in an already volatile region.

sections.heading: Civilian Impact and Casualties
paragraphs: Hospitals across Tehran reported treating injured civilians, with emergency rooms overwhelmed by the sudden influx of patients. Medical facilities activated emergency protocols as casualties from multiple strike sites arrived for treatment.

The residential nature of some targeted areas resulted in significant property damage, with entire families displaced from their homes. Local authorities opened temporary shelters for those unable to return to damaged buildings.
Search and rescue operations continued at several sites, with emergency teams using detection equipment to locate any additional survivors trapped beneath collapsed structures.

sections.heading: Regional Security Implications
paragraphs: The strikes represent a significant military escalation in the ongoing regional conflict, with analysts warning of potential retaliatory actions. Iranian military commanders vowed to respond to what they termed an unprovoked aggression against sovereign territory.

Regional security concerns intensified as neighboring countries increased military readiness and diplomatic activity. The strikes have implications for ongoing nuclear negotiations and regional stability efforts.
Military experts noted the precision targeting capabilities demonstrated, while questioning the strategic value versus the civilian cost of such operations in densely populated areas.

sections.heading: Humanitarian Response
paragraphs: International humanitarian organizations mobilized emergency response teams and medical supplies for affected areas. The Iranian Red Crescent coordinated local rescue and relief efforts across multiple strike sites.

Emergency shelters provided temporary housing for displaced families, while psychological support services were deployed to help trauma survivors. Local volunteers organized donation drives for basic necessities.
Medical teams worked around the clock to treat injured civilians, with several hospitals requesting additional supplies and personnel to manage the crisis response effectively.

faqs.q: How many people were rescued from the Tehran rubble?
faqs.a: At least one man was confirmed rescued alive from the rubble, with search operations continuing for additional survivors at multiple strike sites.

faqs.q: Why did US and Israeli forces strike residential areas in Tehran?
faqs.a: Officials described targeting strategic locations, though strikes also impacted civilian residential buildings, raising questions about targeting accuracy and civilian protection.

faqs.q: What was the international response to the Tehran strikes?
faqs.a: The UN called for de-escalation, while regional allies condemned the action and Western nations defended self-defense rights, creating diplomatic tensions.

faqs.q: How many casualties resulted from the Tehran airstrikes?
faqs.a: Exact casualty figures are still being determined as rescue operations continue, with hospitals treating multiple injured civilians from the strikes.

faqs.q: Will Iran retaliate for the US-Israeli strikes on Tehran?
faqs.a: Iranian military commanders have vowed to respond to what they termed unprovoked aggression, raising concerns about further regional escalation.
